hooks.command: _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/[0-9]* "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/*; do [ -f "$d/scripts/smart-install.js" ] && _R="$d"; done; [ -z "$_R" ] && exit 0; node "$_R/scripts/smart-install.js"

_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/[0-9]* "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/*; do [ -f "$d/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && _R="$d"; done; [ -z "$_R" ] && exit 0; node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/dist/hooks/session-start.cjs"

_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/[0-9]* "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/*; do [ -f "$d/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && _R="$d"; done; [ -z "$_R" ] && exit 0; node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/dist/hooks/user-prompt-submit.cjs"

_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/[0-9]* "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/*; do [ -f "$d/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && _R="$d"; done; [ -z "$_R" ] && exit 0; node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/dist/hooks/post-tool-use.cjs"

_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/[0-9]* "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/*; do [ -f "$d/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && _R="$d"; done; [ -z "$_R" ] && exit 0; node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/dist/hooks/stop.cjs"

_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/[0-9]* "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cache/lore/vault-sync"/*; do [ -f "$d/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && _R="$d"; done; [ -z "$_R" ] && exit 0; node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/dist/hooks/session-end.cjs"
